name: oh-my-brain
description: The second brain that follows you across every agent. Importance-aware memory for Claude Code, Codex, and MCP-compatible tools. (Formerly squeeze-claw.)

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --dts && tsup cli/brain.ts cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/consolidate.ts cli/growth.ts cli/reflect.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts cli/mcp-server.ts cli/actions.ts cli/types-store.ts cli/links-store.ts cli/is-main.ts cli/import.ts cli/init-scan.ts cli/eval.ts cli/import-memory.ts cli/remember.ts cli/brain-store.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.build:cli: tsup cli/brain.ts cli/compress.ts cli/compress-core.ts cli/codex-sync.ts cli/codex-session.ts cli/audit.ts cli/consolidate.ts cli/growth.ts cli/reflect.ts cli/candidates.ts cli/candidates-cli.ts cli/lockfile.ts cli/mcp-server.ts cli/actions.ts cli/types-store.ts cli/links-store.ts cli/is-main.ts cli/import.ts cli/init-scan.ts cli/eval.ts cli/import-memory.ts cli/remember.ts cli/brain-store.ts --format esm --no-dts --out-dir dist/cli
scripts.verify: npm run repo:check && npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
